title: MerchantAddress
description: Address details of the merchant as identified by the system.

city.description:
City name as applicable to represent the Merchant address for a given User Transaction

Endpoints -
  • GET /views/{viewId}/transactions

state.description:
State code as applicable to represent the Merchant address for a given User Transaction.

Endpoints -
  • GET /views/{viewId}/transactions

country.description:
Country code as applicable to represent the Merchant address for a given User Transaction.

Endpoints -
  • GET /views/{viewId}/transactions
